title.en: This is the prelude to the metamorphosis.

content.en:
"Soon, it won't be long before the heart will be completely transformed!"

Ye Tian was quite excited, once his heart transformed, he would be able to impact the Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor realm.

As a Boundary-Breaking Fusion Realm Heavenly Ancestor, once he breaks through to the Blood Transformation Realm, his strength will increase incomparably greatly, and he will directly surpass a Second Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor like the Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor, and maybe it can be comparable to the Third Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

A large amount of golden muscle fluid was consumed, and finally on this day, Ye Tian's heart was about to usher in a metamorphosis.

Rumble!!!!!

The heart kept vibrating, and countless amounts of energy poured into the heart, and even the immeasurable blood began to pour into the heart.

This is the prelude to the metamorphosis.

Soon, the heart began to metamorphose.

And in order to make the heart transform faster, he continued to refine the golden muscle fluid.

With the effect of a large amount of golden muscle fluid, this metamorphosis process is accelerated many times over.

Transformation into one!

Transform into two!

Transformation into three percent!

......

After a long time, Ye Tian's heart has finally completed the transformation of ten percent, that is, the complete transformation has been completed.

Rumble!!!!

The metamorphosis of the heart drives the immeasurable blood to begin to undergo blood changes.

Once the blood transformation is completed, he can become a Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor, and his flesh and blood body will far surpass the Heavenly Ancestor at the peak of the Fusion Body Realm.

At this time.

Ye Tian obviously felt that his immeasurable blood was constantly improving, this was not an improvement in quality, but an evolution, a kind of sublimation, it was no longer the original immeasurable blood, as if he had changed a kind of blood.

And with the immeasurable blood undergoing a blood transformation, his flesh and blood body is also improving, and the increase is getting bigger and bigger.

After a long time, Ye Tian's blood transformation was completed, and the ascension of his flesh and blood body slowed down.

However, in the years that followed, his flesh and blood body could still be improved a little before it could be completely stabilized.

"Breakthrough, a Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor!"

Ye Tian was quite excited.

Subsequently, he changed his duplicate body, and all of them became a Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor Realm.

......

"Hey, the Universal Tower is calling me!"

Ye Tian was a little shocked.

After he broke through to a blood transformation realm, the Cosmos Tower was calling, this was the active call.

He hadn't encountered anything like this before!

There are six floors in the Cosmos Tower, and he had already broken through the fifth floor a long time ago.

While each floor can get some goodies, it's of little use to him.

Swish!

Ye Tian directly entered the sixth layer of the Huanyu Tower with a single thought.

At this time, a message came from the Huanyu Tower.

The sixth level of assessment has begun!

Originally, Ye Tian thought that the assessment of the sixth layer was to fight against a certain Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor, but he was wrong.

Airplanes!!!!

The power of the sixth layer of the Huanyu Tower actually spread directly beyond the territorial waters of Wanlong, enveloping an area in the gap between the territorial waters.

Whoa!!

Six Blood Transformation Realm creatures appeared in his sight, and one of them even reached the second Blood Transformation Realm Creature.

"This is the seam !!! territorial waters"

Ye Tian was extremely shocked.

In the depths of the Cosmos Tower, the Wanlong territorial waters were able to throw their power into the territorial sea boundary crack, and even trapped the creatures of the secondary blood transformation realm.

Suddenly, the mystery of the Cosmos Tower was beyond his imagination.

In short, with his current strength in the Blood Transformation Realm, he still can't see through the Huanyu Tower.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian fought with these six Blood Transformation Realm creatures.

Boom!

A blood transformation realm creature was directly pierced by Ye Tian's extreme technique, and it was severely injured and dying in an instant, and then the second move directly wiped it out.

As the battle continued, one blood mutant creature after another died at his hands, leaving only the second blood mutant creature.

But when Ye Tian dealt with it with all his might, it didn't last long.

Bang bang bang!!!

This creature of the Second Blood Transformation Realm was also severely injured by Ye Tian again and again, and finally died at his hands.

After killing these six Blood Mutant Realm creatures, his authority has become the highest authority of the Cosmos Tower.

Airplanes!

A reward fell into Ye Tian's hands.

"One token!"

What kind of token it was, he didn't know either, but it was absolutely extraordinary.

Swish!

Ye Tian's body left the Huanyu Tower and returned to the outside world.

Then, he began refining the token.

Soon after, the token was successfully refined.

"Universal Order!"

This token is also a Cosmos Order, but it is a real Cosmos Order.

The Huanyu Order given to the Great Ancestors by the Huanyu Tower before was only a low-profile version, and this is the real Huanyu Ling.

"What is the origin of the Cosmos Tower?"

Ye Tian was curious.

He was going to ask the other Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors, maybe they knew.

this day.

Ye Tian came to Falcon Dragon City to visit the Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor.

Knowing that Ye Tian came to visit, the Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor appeared.

The moment he saw Ye Tian, the Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor was shocked: "Endless Heavenly Ancestor, you have stepped into the Blood Transformation Realm????"

He was very confused, how big the movement of breaking through the Blood Transformation Realm was, almost every birth of the Blood Transformation Realm could not be concealed, and they would know it as soon as possible.

But the Endless Heavenly Ancestor broke through to the Blood Transformation Realm without a sound, which is so strange!

Ye Tian explained: "I entered the boundary gap of the territorial sea and got a little chance, so I was lucky enough to break through to the Blood Transformation Realm!"

"Shhh

The Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor gasped, really stunned.

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor, did you go to the Territorial Sea Boundary Gap by yourself to find an opportunity?" asked the Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor, you are really bold, if it were me, I wouldn't dare. It is not for nothing that the Heavenly Ancestors who dared to enter the cracks of the territorial waters to look for opportunities, but almost all of them disappeared, or they did not dare to go deeper, and they retreated. Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor said.

Ye Tian chatted with the Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor for a long time, and then he got to the point.

"Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor, do you know the Cosmos Tower?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Cosmos Tower!" Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor said, "I naturally know that this Cosmos Pagoda has a history and has existed for a long time!"

Ye Tiandao: "Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor, when I broke through to a blood transformation realm, I was called by the Huanyu Tower. Then, when I broke into the sixth floor of the Universal Tower, I actually appeared in the gap between the territorial waters. It's unimaginable that the Universal Tower can affect the boundary gap of territorial waters!"

"Yes, when I first found out, I was really shocked!" "Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor smiled: "When there was no Cosmos Alliance, many Celestial Ancestors broke into the Cosmos Tower. Once you break through to the Blood Transformation Realm, you need to fight with the Blood Transformation Realm creatures in the cracks of the territorial sea boundary. Unfortunately, I didn't make it. The Celestial Ancestors who can break through the sixth layer of the Cosmos Tower are all Celestial Ancestors who have broken through to the Blood Transformation Realm at the Boundary-Breaking Level! "

"Yes!"

Ye Tianying said.
